title: CodeTune v1.1.0 - Core Focus & Stability Sprint
description: Focused sprint on smart context-aware notifications, local spiritual tracking (gamification), and robust error handling.

smart_notifications.title: Smart Prayer Notifications
smart_notifications.description: Implement intelligent notifications that respect the developer's focus

tasks.title: Implement Smart Reminders Core
tasks.description: Create intelligent time notifications based on user context

tasks.title: Add Context-Aware Notifications
tasks.description: Make notifications smarter based on user activity
features: Pause reminders during active coding flow (Focus Mode)

spiritual_tracker.title: Local Spiritual Tracker & Gamification
spiritual_tracker.description: Add local tracking for spiritual achievements (Quran, Prayers, Azkar)

tasks.title: Implement Local Tracker
tasks.description: Create local tracking system using VS Code globalState

tasks.title: Create Tracker Dashboard UI
tasks.description: Add simple UI to display daily spiritual progress

error_handling.title: Enhanced Error Handling and Stability
error_handling.description: Add robust error handling and automatic retry for audio and API failures

tasks.title: Implement Retry Mechanisms
tasks.description: Add automatic retry logic for failed audio streams or API calls
features: Exponential backoff for CDN audio drops
Smart retry conditions based on network state

tasks.title: Add Local Error Reporting
tasks.description: Implement detailed internal error tracking for UI feedback
features: User-friendly VS Code error messages (No stack traces for user)

tasks.title: Create Error Recovery UI
tasks.description: Add user interface for manual retries

benefits_expected: Respects developer's focus with Smart Context-Aware Notifications
Boosts user attachment via Local Spiritual Gamification
Improves extension stability and handles network drops gracefully
technical_requirements: VS Code globalState API for local tracking
VS Code workspace.onDidChangeTextDocument for activity monitoring
success_criteria: Notifications successfully pause when user is actively typing
Spiritual tracker correctly logs data locally without memory leaks
Audio streaming auto-recovers seamlessly on network drops

risks_mitigations.risk: Typing detection might cause lag if not debounced correctly
risks_mitigations.mitigation: Use strict debouncing and throttling for the text document change listener

risks_mitigations.risk: globalState accumulation may cause memory bloat over time
risks_mitigations.mitigation: Periodically prune old tracker entries and cap stored history to a fixed window (e.g., last 30 days)

risks_mitigations.risk: CDN audio stream may silently fail without triggering an error event
risks_mitigations.mitigation: Implement a heartbeat/timeout watchdog that detects stalled streams and triggers the RetryManager
